title: Matchbox polish payload (brain -> app)

id.description: Bullet id that was selected for this CV. Polishing a non-selected bullet is rejected.

original_text.description: Optional: what the brain saw before rephrasing. Surfaced in changes.md.

covers.description: Must-have keywords this rephrasing was intended to carry. Used to validate intent.

description: Written by the brain after the CV is assembled and the coverage report flags missing keywords. Lists the selected bullets whose wording should be rephrased to carry the missing must-have terms. The deterministic side validates each new text against shared/voice-rules.json, replaces the bullets in cv.json, re-renders cv.pdf, and re-runs the keyword-presence check.
